name: GLADSTONE COMMERCIAL CORP
summary: Gladstone Commercial Corp (GOOD) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on acquiring, owning, and operating net leased industrial and office properties across the United States. The company acquires properties leased to creditworthy tenants under long-term net leases, providing stable income. It is externally managed and operates as a publicly traded REIT.

products.name: Net Leased Industrial Properties
products.description: Acquisition and ownership of single-tenant industrial properties under long-term net leases.

products.name: Net Leased Office Properties
products.description: Acquisition and ownership of single-tenant office properties under long-term net leases.

products.name: Net Leased Industrial Properties
products.description: Acquisition and ownership of industrial properties leased on a net basis to business tenants.

products.name: Net Leased Office Properties
products.description: Acquisition and ownership of office properties leased on a net basis to business tenants.

products.name: Net Leased Industrial Properties
products.description: Acquisition and ownership of industrial properties leased to tenants under long-term net lease agreements.

products.name: Net Leased Office Properties
products.description: Acquisition and ownership of office properties leased to tenants under long-term net lease agreements.
